nonBlockingIssues.description: Unused import: `import math` never referenced in app.py line 15

Sort state Store is initialized but never updated by any callback; the sort indicator always shows initial state regardless of user clicks. AG Grid client-side sorting still works for actual reordering.
_load_history_status() re-reads and re-parses history.jsonl independently rather than using data_loader's load_history(), creating duplicated parsing logic
AG Grid has domLayout='autoHeight' combined with style={'height': '100%'} — contradictory layout config, though works in practice with pagination
Best experiment ID embedded directly into JavaScript string via f-string — fragile if IDs ever contain special characters
prevent_initial_call='initial_duplicate' requires Dash >= 2.17, no explicit version pin enforcement

appliedUpdates.description: Updated exp_0360 edge case note: phase 5 range was extended to 9999, so exp_0360 now maps to phase 5 (no longer returns None)

Added 'Dashboard App Import Side Effects' section documenting that dashboard/app.py loads all experiment data at module level, and test files import inside test methods to avoid heavy import-time side effects

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that dashboard/app.py has heavy module-level side effects (loads all ~430 experiments at import time). Workers writing dashboard tests should import dashboard.app inside test methods, not at module level, to avoid slow test collection.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both features (dash-app-shell-and-leaderboard and experiment-detail-view) follow this pattern. All tests in TestDashboardApp, TestLeaderboardLogic, and TestDetailViewBuilder import inside test methods. Feature dash-app-shell-and-leaderboard review flagged this as a convention workers need to know.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that the test file tests/test_dashboard.py is monolithic (~1200+ lines) containing tests for data_loader, app shell, leaderboard logic, and detail view. Future workers adding dashboard tests should append to this file following the existing class-based organization pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dash-app-shell-and-leaderboard review noted the file docstring says 'Tests for dashboard data loader module' but it also contains TestDashboardApp, TestLeaderboardLogic, and TestDetailViewBuilder classes. This is the established convention for this project.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Dash 4.0 compatibility note to frontend-worker skill: use prevent_initial_call='initial_duplicate' instead of True for URL state restore callbacks. This is a non-obvious requirement that was discovered during implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dash-app-shell-and-leaderboard had to fix this issue (commit 32b78ed mentions 'Fix test layout traversal for Dash 4.0 component tree structure'). The standard Dash pattern of prevent_initial_call=True doesn't work correctly with Dash 4.0's component tree traversal.

rejectedObservations.observation: Separate dashboard venv at dashboard/.venv/ distinct from project root .venv/
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: already present in .factory/library/environment.md under 'Venv location' and 'Venv Notes' sections

rejectedObservations.observation: Dashboard runs on port 8050 documented in services.yaml with PYTHONPATH set correctly
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: services.yaml already contains correct start/stop/healthcheck commands with PYTHONPATH
